{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dreadgod battlefield
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Enemies can be found on a [[Dreadgod battlefield]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] requested transportation to the [[Dreadgod battlefield]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
